petoskey.site: Petoskey Pit civic bowl (Scenario E, in-situ package)
petoskey.crs: EPSG:6494 NAD83(2011) Michigan Central, intl ft; NAVD88 ft

dem.value: 2015 USGS LiDAR (MI 13County C16) + 2026 supplement, design rasters at 1 ft

capacity.note: nominal Scenario E baseline; 1,243 Band-A validated; options to 1,505 validated
capacity.capacity_basis: geometric seat count from validated tread lengths (NOT ticketing or code occupant load); compare with care against SB ticketing capacity and Meijer lawn capacity

dem_type.value: design surface: proposed_grade_1ft.tif (1 ft) built on bare-earth 2015 USGS LiDAR + 2026 supplement
dem_type.note: treads are designed geometry, not survey returns

audience_facing_az_deg.note: seating axis az 132 -> nominal facing 312; bay-view corridor az 330

stage_effective_frontage_ft.note: union of stage_core + 2x17 ft shoulders (bowl_zones.geojson), extent perpendicular to the az-150 stage axis; counts as frontage only if shoulders are programmed as performance surface (Rule 9 OPEN)

row1_chord_ft.note: 2 x 85 ft x sin(55 deg) chord across the fan

frontage_coverage.note: chord = straight-line width across the fan at row 1; arc_geometric = 110 deg x 85 ft; row1_physical = built tread length (gaps at hinges excluded)

stage_front_to_row1_ft.note: CURRENT adopted P_opt per-section core->row-1 gaps (e/b/s); governing occupied-deck gaps with the five_facet_apron are 12.0/29.6/18.8; >=12 ft in-situ pocket gate PASS. The uniform 35 ft is RETIRED design_open_low — see stage_front_to_row1_openlow_ft

stage_front_to_row1_openlow_ft.note: historical single-fan uniform value (row 1 at radius 85); NOT current canon

upper_row_distance_ft.note: stage front -> top row on the bay axis: bend on-axis gap (32.7 ft) + seating depth (rN - r1 radii); no longer uses the retired 35 ft

row1_arc_length_ft.note: geometric 110 deg x 85 ft; physical row-1 treads total 131.6 ft

frontage_to_row1_arc.note: CORE width over geometric arc — see frontage_coverage for the full matrix

row_count_est.note: formal rows 1-18 minus promenade 5 + aisle 9/10 = 15 treads x 3 sections

ada.value: Legacy ADA route geometry REJECTED 2026-06-12 (disconnected fragments; quarantined in vectors_geojson/legacy_ada_rejected.geojson). Rebuilt node-to-node network passes topology->conflict->slope gates as an ADA-compliant route CONCEPT pending civil/code detailing (analysis/ada_rebuild/ada_validation.json).

route_concept.value: rebuilt 7-route node network: rim arrival + south rim egress + cross-aisle + floor + wheelchair clusters w/ companions + classified service spur; concept tier

vertical_drop_ft.value: ~16 ft rim->cross-aisle over a 418 ft route; ~28 ft rim->floor over 456 ft; landings marked every <=2.5 ft rise (pads pending civil detailing)

dispersion.value: two accessible elevations (event floor + cross-aisle) topology-connected in the rebuilt network — CONCEPT, not built/verified; ADAAG 221 counts unchecked

redundancy.value: two rim connections (arrival east, egress south) on separate flanks; full route independence (disjointness) NOT yet analyzed — do not claim 'two independent routes'

sightline_preservation.value: wheelchair refs at rebuilt landings carry blocks_bay_view flags; NOT C-value validated

validation_scope.value: analysis/ada_rebuild/ada_validation.json gates IN ORDER topology -> conflicts (treatment cell/swale crossing types/stage/wedge/fragments) -> slopes -> landings; the legacy slope-only artifact (Scenario_E_baseline_reemit/validation.json) is VOID as a route validation. Unchecked: widths, landing dims, turning radii, handrails, edge protection, clear floor space, companion dims, surface FSS, cross slope, ADAAG 221 dispersion counts.

backdrop.value: open to Little Traverse Bay az 330; no upstage wall (landscape venue)

santa_barbara_bowl.location: 1122 N Milpas St, Santa Barbara, CA
santa_barbara_bowl.crs: EPSG:26911 (m), vertical NAVD88 m -> reported ft

dem.value: USGS one meter x25y382 CA Montecito (1.0 m)

capacity.capacity_basis: published ticketing capacity, configuration-dependent: 4,562 standard reserved (Wikipedia infobox); venue seating page lists 4,500 reserved-floor / 5,000 GA-floor totals

dem_type.note: VERIFIED — hillshade resolves concentric terrace banding matching aerial imagery (diagnostic_dem.png vs diagnostic_imagery.png); graded bench terraces survive bare-earth filtering as ground
dem_type.known_voids: stage house filtered to ground beneath deck; individual ~1 ft risers below 1 m resolution

audience_facing_az_deg.note: from OSM stage rectangle orientation + seating side; consistent w/ DEM fall line

stage_frontage_ft.note: inferred: deck west-edge span read from hillshade/imagery; OSM house long dim 125 ft is the upper bound incl. wings

stage_depth_ft.note: inferred: performance deck depth unknown; OSM house short dim 79 ft includes backstage; 2002 rebuild total 10,000 sqft stage+backstage bounds it

stage_front_to_row1_ft.note: digitized 2026-06-12 from DEM centerline profile fine structure + hillshade ring reads; row1 = first riser, seating_top = upper concourse bench at ~248 ft elev

fan_angle_deg.note: angular extent (2-98 pct) of mid-bowl contour about stage-front anchor (anchor center inferred); imagery read was 140 deg

inner_radius_ft.note: row-1 distance from stage-front arc center; contour check r(row1+2ft) = 43.4 ft

outer_radius_ft.note: top-of-seating distance on centerline; contour check r(top-2ft) = 212.3 ft

upper_row_distance_ft.note: stage front -> top seating row, on axis

row1_arc_length_ft.note: measured fan x row-1 radius (anchor center inferred)

row_count_est.value: 40 lettered terrace rows in 4 banks + 14 floor rows (T/U/V)
row_count_est.note: published 2007 venue seating chart (archived PDF); supersedes earlier ~30-40 imagery estimate

ada.value: main cross-aisle visible ~ring 30 m + concourse at top of bowl; ADA platform added 2003 (published); switchback access roads N and S of bowl

route_concept.value: vehicular/walk approach to a single accessible level immediately behind the floor; designated HANDICAPPED sections P (house L) and S (house R) flanking Founders Row

vertical_drop_ft.value: bowl rises 68.8 ft floor->top; accessible seating avoids it by staying at the near-floor level

dispersion.value: single elevation, two lateral positions (P+S); no upper-bowl accessible seating evident

redundancy.value: two flank approaches (N and S service paths) to the accessible level

sightline_preservation.value: front-of-bank positions look over the floor sections; plausibly preserved but UNVERIFIED (no C-value data)

backdrop.value: audience faces ~E into canyon hillside (oak woodland) behind stage house; enclosed canyon venue with tall stage house + roof

meijer_gardens_amphitheater.location: 1000 E Beltline Ave NE, Grand Rapids, MI
meijer_gardens_amphitheater.crs: EPSG:26916 (m), vertical NAVD88 m -> reported ft

dem.value: USGS one meter x61y476 MI 31Co Kent 2016 (1.0 m)

capacity.source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Frederik_Meijer_Gardens (tiered lawn seating for 1,900; flagged citation-needed there, but the 1,900 figure is used venue-wide in press)
capacity.capacity_basis: published lawn/event capacity (~1,900 on tiered lawn) — press-circulated figure; venue's own pages publish NO capacity; Wikipedia passage citation-needed. NOT a fixed-seat count

dem_type.note: VERIFIED — hillshade resolves lawn-terrace/seat-wall arcs matching aerial imagery (diagnostic_dem.png vs diagnostic_imagery.png)
dem_type.known_voids: pond N of stage is a flattened water return at 809.5 ft; ~18 in seat walls below 1 m resolution

audience_facing_az_deg.note: from OSM stage rectangle orientation + seating side; consistent w/ DEM fall line

stage_frontage_ft.note: inferred: lens-canopy chord facing audience from OSM footprint (long dim 110 ft); deck edge slightly inside canopy

stage_depth_ft.note: inferred: OSM canopy short dim 54 ft; deck inset

stage_front_to_row1_ft.note: digitized 2026-06-12 from DEM centerline profile fine structure; row1 = first terrace seat-wall, top = lawn crest before promenade

fan_angle_deg.note: angular extent (2-98 pct) of mid-bowl contour about stage-front anchor (anchor center inferred); imagery read was 100 deg

inner_radius_ft.note: row-1 distance from stage-front arc center; contour check r(row1+2ft) = 31.2 ft

outer_radius_ft.note: top-of-seating distance on centerline; contour check r(top-2ft) = 96.1 ft

upper_row_distance_ft.note: stage front -> top seating row, on axis

row1_arc_length_ft.note: measured fan x row-1 radius (anchor center inferred)

row_count_est.note: inferred: hillshade/imagery arc count ring 8-38 m; 1 m DEM cannot resolve individual seat walls

ada.value: level entry plaza at stage sides; flanking paths both sides of lawn; cross path mid-bowl ~ring 35 m (imagery)

route_concept.value: level garden-path entries at the bottom plaza (stage level) and along the rim promenade of a low bowl

vertical_drop_ft.value: 12.9 ft total bowl rise; both top and bottom reachable on garden paths without dedicated ramp structures

dispersion.value: likely bottom plaza + top-of-lawn positions (two elevations); not formally marked in any public source found

redundancy.value: paths flank both sides of the lawn

sightline_preservation.value: unverified; lawn venue with shallow rake

backdrop.value: audience faces ~NNE across stage to pond + sculpture-park woodland; low covered stage, open landscape backdrop
